title: Honeycomb & Bees
description: A living frame of honeycomb: waxen hexagonal cells, some capped, some brimming with glossy amber honey that catches the light, and worker bees crawling over the comb — wings shivering, antennae twitching — pausing at cells to tend them before ambling on. The pointer draws the bees over to investigate; beats set the whole colony bustling. Comb scale, honey fill, bee count, speed and warmth are live and mappable.
